Happy Anniversary

A Message of Love

From the very beginning, you

Happy Anniversary, my love

I don't say this enough, but thank you… for staying with me through everything. Through the good, the hard, the confusing moments — you never left, and that means the world to me.

I thank God for your life every single day, because having you as mine is something I cherish deeply. You've been my strength in ways you don't even realize. When I felt like I didn't have much to give, you still showed up for me with love, patience, and understanding.

Thank you for supporting me, for believing in me, and for standing by me in everything I do. It's not something I take lightly at all.

And thank you for making our relationship feel like home… safe, calm, and full of love. Being with you has changed me in the best way.

I'm so grateful for us, for everything we've been through, and for everything we're still building together.

I love you, always and deeply.

— With all my love

To You, Always

What love looks like

It is the coffee made before I wake.
The hand reached for in the cinema dark.
The joke only we understand.
The quiet evenings that feel like everything.

It is choosing each other, again and again —
in all the ways love asks us to.

Abiola & Adebola

Happy Anniversary — with love, always

✦ ✦ ✦ Made with love  ·  For a love that lasts
